nasb.text: (one third also shall be at the gate Sur, and one third at the gate behind the guards), shall keep watch over the house for defense.

esv.text: (another third being at the gate Sur and a third at the gate behind the guards) shall guard the palace.

cnv.text: 三分之一要在蘇珥門；三分之一要在衛兵院的後門；你們要輪班把守王宮。

ccb.text: 三分之一要守卫苏珥门，三分之一要守住卫兵院后门。你们要轮流守卫。
